next_steps: Perform treponemal antibody test (EIA/TP-PA) and RPR
Perform urinalysis with microscopy for RBC casts
Obtain skin or nasal mucosal biopsy for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Order autoimmune serology panel (ANA, RF, anti-CCP, C3, C4)
Perform complete blood count with peripheral smear review to assess for cytopenias or macrocytosis
